codeReview.summary: Implementation meets all core requirements. Worker correctly spawns ffmpeg, parses stderr for progress, emits progress at least once per second via timer, detects stream copy and emits indeterminate progress, handles cancellation with SIGKILL, and includes output file size in done message. Code is well-documented and clean. Two minor non-blocking issues identified.

issues.description: After emitting indeterminate progress for stream copy, the timer will send stale progress (percent: 0) every second. Once indeterminate is sent, subsequent progress messages should be suppressed. Currently: isStreamCopy sets hasReceivedProgress=true, and lastPercent=0. Timer then fires every second sending {type:'progress', percent:0}. This is misleading for stream copy which has no real progress percentage.

The documented WorkerData interface includes isStreamCopy field, but implementation derives it from args via isStreamCopyOperation(). This is actually MORE robust (doesn't rely on caller passing correct flag), but diverges from documented interface.

sharedStateObservations.observation: No convention gaps found. The worker follows the architecture defined in .factory/library/architecture.md correctly - spawns ffmpeg, parses stderr, streams progress back to main via parentPort.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/main/workers/encode.ts implements worker thread that spawns ffmpeg, parses progress, sends messages via parentPort - matches architecture diagram.

summary: ffmpeg-encoding-worker feature implementation passes review. Core requirements fully met: ffmpeg spawning, progress parsing with time= extraction, timer-based 1/sec update guarantee, stream copy detection with immediate indeterminate progress, SIGKILL cancellation, and output file size in done message. Two minor non-blocking issues: (1) timer sends stale 0% progress after indeterminate is sent for stream copy - not harmful but misleading, (2) implementation derives isStreamCopy from args rather than using WorkerData field - more robust but undocumented. All verification commands pass (test: 245 passed, typecheck: pass, lint: 0 errors, build: success).
